svg.title: Four-layer protocol stack
svg.desc: The protocol organized as four stacked layers. Top to bottom: Dialogue state, Participation, Orchestration, then a divider separating semantic from implementation, then Delivery drawn with a dashed border to mark it swappable. Participation carries a badge noting it is what distinguishes this from a pure agent-to-agent protocol.
svg.text: top three layers = semantic protocol; Delivery only ships the records they produce
